name: Steven Paladino
currentRole: Retired / Board Member, Henry Schein, Inc
formerRole: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Henry Schein, Inc
connectionToCompany: Steven Paladino served as EVP and CFO at Henry Schein for decades before transitioning; Ronald N. South succeeded him in the CFO role, making Paladino a direct predecessor and close collaborator during transition
sourceNote: SEC filings and Henry Schein proxy statements identify Paladino as longtime CFO predecessor to South
verificationNote: Gemini confirmed Steven Paladino as former EVP and CFO at Henry Schein, Inc, now retired and serving as Board Member. Current role is not an active C-suite executive position, so no removal required. All details consistent with verification evidence.
